decisionSummary: Optional advisory UI exposure is designable as row-specific advanced metadata for decoration.screen_shader, but runnable UI implementation must wait for a dedicated implementation sprint. The current design projects a future explicit advanced action that is separated from apply, requires user trigger and consent messaging, displays non-authoritative advisory results, and cannot approve, block, or bypass write safety.

advisoryPassPolicy.message: Standalone advisory check passed. This is not Hyprland runtime safety proof and does not approve or apply the write.

advisoryFailurePolicy.message: Standalone advisory warning. This does not automatically block the write and does not change validators or write planning.

missingToolPolicy.message: glslangValidator is missing, so the optional advisory check is unavailable. This does not approve or block writes.

timeoutPolicy.message: The optional advisory check timed out. This is inconclusive and does not approve or block writes.

cleanupWarningPolicy.message: Temp cleanup warning should be logged or displayed without approving, blocking, or bypassing writes.

standaloneCompilerCommandScope: full-regression-existing-helper-tests-only-generated-temp-fixtures; UI exposure design projection does not run compiler commands

recommendedValidationPolicy.summary: A future UI implementation may expose the advisory helper as an explicit advanced action for decoration.screen_shader only, but advisory output must remain non-authoritative and disconnected from write safety.

compatibilityGaps: UI execution of the advisory helper is not implemented in this sprint.
No UI proof exists yet for file chooser behavior, output rendering, progress state, or cancellation.
Advisory glslangValidator output is not Hyprland runtime safety proof.
No production compile-aware validator is implemented.
No official Hyprland non-live screen-shader validation interface was found.
proofUsed: src/ui/model.rs projects design-only advisory metadata only for decoration.screen_shader.

tests/row_detail.rs proves the screen-shader detail projection requires advanced placement, explicit user trigger, consent/temp-copy/runtime-safety/production-gate messages, and does not approve, block, bypass, or auto-run in validation/write phases.
Existing advisory helper implementation proof proves the helper requires consent, uses temp copies, handles result states, and remains unwired from write safety.
Existing production gate approval report proves decoration.screen_shader remains writable and production-gated.
Aggregate reports link this design as metadata-only without changing counts, SAFE_WRITABLE_ROWS, write allowlist, validators, pending changes, write planning, apply flow, or production gate behavior.
proofStillMissing: No full GTK file chooser/widget implementation exists for selecting a shader and displaying the advisory result visually.
No UI proof exists for cancellation or screenshot-backed visual presentation.
No proof exists that glslangValidator output is equivalent to Hyprland's OpenGL runtime compile/link behavior.
No production compile-aware validator implementation exists.
nextRecommendedSprint: Screen shader optional advisory file chooser execution proof sprint: implement visible file selection only if it can use generated fixture/temp files in tests, never read real user shader files in tests, pass only temp paths to glslangValidator, and keep advisory output disconnected from write safety.
